# Lighting Product Card Template

## Purpose

Defines the ideal CyberMedica card for operating and examination lights.

## Required Sections

- Identity: manufacturer, model, variant, registration number, status.
- Classification: surgical light, examination light, ceiling/mobile/wall.
- Documents: RU, user manual, datasheet, installation manual if available.
- Optical characteristics: illuminance, color temperature, CRI, field diameter.
- Mechanical: arm type, mounting, rotation, positioning, load.
- Electrical: power, voltage, consumption, backup options.
- Environmental: heat, operating conditions.
- Accessories: camera, control panels, sterile handles.
- Maintenance/service: cleaning, lamp/LED lifetime, service intervals.
- Procurement notes: mounting and room planning requirements.
- Evidence: source documents and locators.

## Critical Fields

- illuminance;
- color temperature;
- mounting type;
- electrical data;
- accessories;
- installation requirements.

## Safety

Do not publish installation or electrical claims from brochure alone. Use
manuals, datasheets or installation documents.
